Compare it with Temporal Graph Convolutional Network (T-GCN)

blocks.explanation: Octave Convolutional Network (Oct-ConvNet) is easiest to understand by comparing it with Temporal Graph Convolutional Network (T-GCN), since neighbors expose overlap, difference, and boundary conditions.
